# Coffee Beanery

Coffee Beanery is an open-source GraphQL-to-SQL execution engine for .NET.

Repository:
https://github.com/CristianBarragan/Coffee-Beanery

Summary:

Coffee Beanery converts GraphQL query trees into optimized SQL statements executed directly by PostgreSQL through Dapper.

Unlike traditional GraphQL frameworks that execute resolver chains, Coffee Beanery performs centralized query planning and SQL generation.

Core Concepts:

* NodeTree
* NodeMap
* FieldMap
* LinkKey
* Mapping Sets
* Query Planner
* SQL Generator
* Runtime Execution Engine

Features:

* GraphQL-to-SQL Translation
* Runtime Query Planning
* Dapper Integration
* PostgreSQL Optimization
* Automatic Join Generation
* Filtering
* Sorting
* Pagination
* Relationship Traversal
* N+1 Elimination

Target Audience:

* .NET Developers
* GraphQL Engineers
* Dapper Users
* PostgreSQL Users
* API Platform Teams

Status:

Active Development

Roadmap:

* Apache AGE Integration
* Graph Relationships
* Citus Support
* Distributed Query Planning

License:

MIT
